overall.description: A futuristic spaceship cruises over a cratered lunar or planetary surface in deep space, illuminated by a distant sun. The footage appears to be from a high-fidelity space simulation game, featuring smooth third-person camera tracking behind the vessel as it flies above the rocky terrain.

scene_state.functional_zone: cratered lunar surface in deep space

agents.ego_description: piloting the spaceship in a steady forward cruise over the cratered planetary surface, maintaining constant altitude

entered.detail: rugged rocky planetary surface covered with impact craters and scattered boulders
curved edge of the celestial body silhouetted against the blackness of space
distant sun positioned above the horizon casting stark shadows across the surface

segments.scene_description: The camera follows a futuristic spaceship from behind as it cruises over a desolate, cratered moon surface. The terrain below is rugged and airless, illuminated by a bright distant sun against the black void of space. No other objects or entities are visible in the empty expanse.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement tracking a futuristic spaceship as it glides over a desolate, airless planetary expanse. It begins with a steady pursuit from behind the vessel, capturing its smooth trajectory across a rugged, cratered moon surface. As the ship advances, the camera maintains its focus on the stark contrast between the brightly illuminated rocky terrain and the oppressive black void of space. The scene remains an empty, silent expanse, emphasizing the isolation of the craft as it cruises further into the desolate lunar landscape.
